message:
Implement N-way race_all combinator types (asupersync-akx.8.2)

Add RaceAll<T> marker type for N-way racing, RaceAllError<E> with
winner index tracking, update race_all_to_result to use the new
error type, and add make_race_all_result helper function.

Includes comprehensive tests for all new functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
